prose:
**TEMPO frontier–orbital gap** — DFT single-point (Koopmans-style HOMO/LUMO gap) at tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, exact two-electron integrals, no density fitting) in PySCF; geometry from user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/tempo/tempo.xyz` (unrelaxed), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 2. SCF converged in 12 cycles; no warnings reported. CLI invocation:  
```
/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/tempo/tempo.xyz --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 2 --stdout path --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp2q9lwn5e/live.json
```  
Result JSON: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp2q9lwn5e/live.json`; live SCF log: `frontier_<timestamp>.out` (written to the current working directory as the calculation ran).  
HOMO = –6.3375439 eV; LUMO = –2.4651235 eV → frontier gap = **3.8724203 eV**.
